prd.name: LLM Product Discovery
prd.prdSummary: AI-powered natural-language product discovery with classic search fallback — Saleor Cloud + Next.js/Vercel + AWS (eu-central-1)

conventions.storyPoints: Fibonacci (1,2,3,5,8); Jira story-points custom field ID varies per instance — map on import
conventions.dependsOn: Jira issue links of type 'Blocks' (listed task must finish first)

tasks.summary: Set up CDK project skeleton with dev/prod environments and CI/CD pipeline
tasks.description: Infrastructure-as-code repo (AWS CDK, TypeScript), stack layout per component, GitHub Actions deploy pipeline, environment config for dev and prod in eu-central-1.

tasks.summary: Provision OpenSearch domain (Multi-AZ, stempel Polish plugin) via CDK
tasks.description: 3 data nodes Multi-AZ, EBS sizing for catalog scale, stempel analysis plugin enabled, fine-grained access control, VPC/IAM policies.

tasks.summary: Design and create product index mapping (Polish analyzer, k-NN vector, availability flags)
tasks.description: Fields: name, description, category path, partner, location, tags, price, rating, image URL, exclusivity flag, partner_active, seasonally_available, published, in_stock, excluded_from_ai, dense vector (k-NN). Polish analyzer + edge n-grams + completion suggester subfields.

tasks.summary: Scaffold Saleor App and register catalog webhooks
tasks.description: Saleor App with app token auth; subscribe to PRODUCT_CREATED/UPDATED/DELETED, PRODUCT_VARIANT_*, channel listing change events; app installation flow on Saleor Cloud.

tasks.summary: Build webhook ingestion endpoint: API Gateway -> SQS with DLQ
tasks.description: Signature verification of Saleor webhooks, buffering queue, retry policy, dead-letter queue with alarm.

tasks.summary: Implement Indexer Lambda: Saleor GraphQL fetch and document mapping
tasks.description: On queue message, fetch full product via Saleor GraphQL, transform to index document including availability flags, upsert/delete in OpenSearch.

tasks.summary: Add embedding generation to indexer with content-hash change detection
tasks.description: Build embedding text (name + description + category + tags + attributes), call Bedrock embedding model, skip re-embedding when content hash unchanged (cost control).

tasks.summary: Spike: benchmark Cohere Embed Multilingual vs Titan Text Embeddings V2 on Polish catalog (ADR-3)
tasks.description: Retrieval-quality benchmark on a representative Polish catalog sample with ~100 test queries; measure recall@10/MRR; confirm eu-central-1 availability and EU-only routing; decision documented as ADR update. Timeboxed to 1 week.

tasks.summary: Build nightly full reconciliation job (EventBridge Scheduler + Step Functions)
tasks.description: Walk full Saleor catalog nightly, diff against index, heal missed webhooks; re-embed only changed content; completion metric + alarm on drift threshold.

tasks.summary: Sync partner suspension and seasonal availability flags
tasks.description: Read partner status and seasonal availability from Saleor channel listings/metadata; map to partner_active and seasonally_available booleans; propagation target < 5 min from webhook.

tasks.summary: Establish secrets management and least-privilege IAM baseline
tasks.description: Saleor app token and API keys in Secrets Manager; per-Lambda IAM roles scoped to minimum; Vercel encrypted env vars for storefront-side config.

tasks.summary: Build Search Proxy Lambda with API Gateway routes
tasks.description: Endpoints: /search, /suggest, /catalog (filters + facets + sort); request validation; response shaping for storefront consumption.

tasks.summary: Implement search-as-you-type suggestions (completion suggester + edge n-grams)
tasks.description: As-you-type suggestions across product name, partner, category; debounce-friendly latency (<150 ms server-side).

tasks.summary: Implement typo-tolerant multi-field search
tasks.description: fuzziness:AUTO across name, partner, category, location, tags with Polish analysis; field boosting; acceptance: misspelled queries still return relevant results.

tasks.summary: Implement catalog filters with per-filter result counts and sorting
tasks.description: Aggregations for price ranges, category, location, attributes; result counts per facet value; sort by price/rating/newest; filters compose correctly.

tasks.summary: Storefront: classic search UI with debounced autocomplete
tasks.description: Header search box, debounced suggest calls, keyboard navigation, results page; Polish UI copy.

tasks.summary: Storefront: catalog browsing page with filters, sorting, and result counts
tasks.description: Filter sidebar with live counts, sort dropdown, URL-synced filter state, pagination/infinite scroll, SSR/ISR-friendly.

tasks.summary: Build shared product card component
tasks.description: Photo, name, location, price, customer rating, exclusivity badge; used across AI suggestions, classic results, and catalog; links to standard product page.

tasks.summary: Tune search relevance and validate Polish analysis on real catalog data
tasks.description: Field boosts, synonym list seed, stemming verification on real product data; sign-off checklist with sample query set.

tasks.summary: Load test classic search and review index sizing
tasks.description: Throughput and latency test at 3x projected peak; confirm node sizing; document scale-up plan.

tasks.summary: Build Orchestrator Lambda skeleton with pipeline stages
tasks.description: Stage wiring per technical solution: quota -> cache -> guardrails -> rules -> retrieval gate -> retrieval -> LLM -> validation -> response; structured logging + X-Ray per stage.

tasks.summary: Configure Bedrock Guardrails (Standard tier, Polish) with denied topics
tasks.description: Content filters + prompt-attack detection on input, output screening; denied topics: medical/legal advice, politics; blocked-response copy in Polish; wired to EU cross-region profile.

tasks.summary: Implement retrieval-score gate (pre-LLM off-topic filter)
tasks.description: Embed query, run hybrid search, short-circuit to no-match path when top-hit normalized score below threshold; threshold tuned on eval set; saves LLM cost on off-topic queries.

tasks.summary: Implement hybrid retrieval query (BM25 + k-NN, hard filters, exclusive boost)
tasks.description: Score-normalized hybrid query returning top ~25 candidates; hard filter clause (partner_active AND seasonally_available AND published AND NOT excluded_from_ai); retrieval boost for exclusive products.

tasks.summary: Prompt engineering: Claude Haiku 4.5 structured suggestion output
tasks.description: System prompt (Polish output, honesty rules, favor exclusives only when fitting, never invent, off_topic flag); candidate list format; JSON schema output: 3-5 ids, 1-2 sentence explanation each, match_confidence; iterate against eval harness.

tasks.summary: Implement post-validation: candidate-set grounding and confidence handling
tasks.description: Drop any returned id not in candidate set; low match_confidence or empty result routes to no-match path; malformed LLM output triggers one retry then fallback.

tasks.summary: Implement honest no-match path with closest alternatives and demand-signal event
tasks.description: Polish 'not in our offer' response + closest alternatives from retrieval; unmatched-demand event emitted to analytics pipeline; never presents non-existent products.

tasks.summary: Implement manual-rules matcher with pinned product injection
tasks.description: Admin rules embedded at save; cosine similarity of query to rule above threshold injects pinned products at top of candidate set; rules evaluated before retrieval.

tasks.summary: Enforce AI exclusion list end to end
tasks.description: excluded_from_ai flag written to index on admin save; hard filter in AI retrieval only (classic search unaffected); acceptance: excluded product never appears in suggestions from save onward.

tasks.summary: Implement 'show more suggestions' cursor
tasks.description: DynamoDB session cursor (TTL 30 min) tracking shown ids; next invocation excludes them; returns 3-5 distinct new suggestions.

tasks.summary: Implement per-visitor usage quotas
tasks.description: Anonymous visitor ID cookie; DynamoDB atomic counters; configurable daily limit (default 15 AI queries); polite Polish limit message with classic-search redirect.

tasks.summary: Configure AWS WAF on AI endpoint
tasks.description: Rate-based rules per IP, AWS managed rule sets, max payload size, bot control evaluation.

tasks.summary: Implement exact-match response cache with serve-time revalidation
tasks.description: Query normalization (lowercase, trim, diacritics, punctuation) -> hash key -> DynamoDB TTL 6-24h; cache stores product ids + explanations only; serve-time mget re-checks availability filters and drops stale ids.

tasks.summary: Implement semantic cache over query embeddings
tasks.description: Cached query vectors in OpenSearch with response pointers; cosine similarity >= ~0.95 reuses cached result; hit-rate metric emitted; global cache-version key respected.

tasks.summary: Enable Bedrock prompt caching for static system prefix
tasks.description: Mark system prompt as cache prefix in Bedrock calls; verify cache-read pricing takes effect via invocation logs.

tasks.summary: Storefront: homepage hero AI search with suggestion cards
tasks.description: Natural-language input ('Opisz, czego szukasz...'), loading state, 3-5 suggestion cards with fit explanations reusing product card component, links to product pages; server-side API calls only.

tasks.summary: Storefront: show-more and graceful fallback to classic search
tasks.description: 'Show more' wired to cursor; 6 s client timeout budget; on error/timeout/kill-switch, query passed to classic search with friendly notice — no dead end; feature flag for instant disable.

tasks.summary: Build offline quality eval harness (~200 Polish queries)
tasks.description: Curated query set with expected products; LLM-as-judge scoring + human spot-check protocol; run gates every prompt/model/index change; report artifact in CI.

tasks.summary: AI path latency optimization to p95 <= 4 s
tasks.description: Stage-level profiling (X-Ray), parallelize guardrails/retrieval where safe, tune candidate count and output length; document final latency budget per stage.

tasks.summary: Saleor App UI: AI exclusion list management
tasks.description: Product search + add/remove from exclusion list; writes DynamoDB + index flag; effective immediately with cache invalidation.

tasks.summary: Saleor App UI: manual suggestion rules with test preview
tasks.description: CRUD for 'for requests like X, suggest Y' rules; live preview runs the rule against the matcher; rule embeddings generated on save.

tasks.summary: Build internal admin API (IAM-auth API Gateway + Lambda + DynamoDB)
tasks.description: Endpoints for exclusions, rules, and analytics queries; authorized for the Saleor App only; audit log of admin changes.

tasks.summary: Build analytics event pipeline with anonymization
tasks.description: Impression, click, unmatched-demand, off-topic events -> Kinesis Firehose -> S3; hashed rotating visitor ID; no PII; partitioned storage for Athena.

tasks.summary: Create Athena tables and dashboard queries
tasks.description: Queries for: anonymized query log, suggestion CTR, unmatched requests, AI usage volume, estimated cost per query; scheduled materialization if needed for dashboard latency.

tasks.summary: Saleor App UI: discovery analytics dashboard
tasks.description: Views: query log (anonymized), CTR trends, unmatched-demand list with export, usage and cost; date-range filtering.

tasks.summary: Implement global cache-version invalidation on admin edits
tasks.description: Version key bumped on exclusion/rule changes; exact-match and semantic caches check version; stale entries lazily evicted.

tasks.summary: Implement data retention and anonymization jobs
tasks.description: Rotating salt for visitor hashing; 12-month purge of query data (S3 lifecycle + Athena partition drop); documented GDPR purpose limitation.

tasks.summary: Build CloudWatch dashboards and SLO alarms
tasks.description: p95 latency per stage, error rates, Bedrock token consumption, cache hit rate, quota rejections, fallback activation rate; alarms to on-call channel.

tasks.summary: Set up AWS Budgets and daily Bedrock spend alarm with auto kill-switch
tasks.description: Monthly budget alarm at 80%; daily Bedrock spend threshold triggers automatic feature-flag disable of AI search (storefront degrades to classic search).

tasks.summary: Load test AI path and chaos-test fallback
tasks.description: 3x projected peak on AI endpoint; induced Bedrock/OpenSearch failures verify seamless classic-search fallback and no dead ends.

tasks.summary: Security review / pentest of AI endpoint
tasks.description: Prompt injection attempts, quota bypass, WAF evasion, data exfiltration via responses; findings triaged and blockers fixed before launch.

tasks.summary: Write runbooks and launch ramp-up plan
tasks.description: On-call runbooks (index drift, Bedrock errors, cost spike, kill switch); feature-flag ramp-up plan (internal -> 10% -> 50% -> 100%); rollback procedure.

tasks.summary: Go-live: staged rollout with monitoring sign-off
tasks.description: Execute ramp-up plan; monitor SLOs, cost per query, CTR at each stage; launch review with success-metric baseline captured.
